title: neomammillaria vetula
intro: Neomammillaria vetula, also known as the Old Lady Cactus, is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neomammillaria vetula include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, salves, and ointments, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
